name: Spicy Gazpacho with Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the garlic and salt together to form a paste.
2. In a blender, combine the garlic paste, bread cubes, red wine vinegar, olive oil, cumin, and 1 cup of tomato juice. Blend until smooth.
3. Transfer the blended mixture to a large bowl. Add the remaining tomato juice and vegetables. Stir well and chill for at least 3 hours. If desired, thin the gazpacho with cold water.
4. Cook the shrimp in boiling salted water until just opaque. Drain and cool in cold water. Serve the cooked shrimp alongside the chilled gazpacho, garnished with a generous sprinkle of mint.
